title: The Ukraine War Amputees Embracing Wake Boarding and Jujitsu
summary_full: As the number of amputees in Ukraine soars, many are bonding by learning new sports, challenging both their bodies and their ideas of what they can do.
summary_public: As the number of amputees in Ukraine soars, many are bonding by learning new sports, challenging both their bodies and their ideas of what they can do.
